comment: Kernel images are sourced from cilium little-vm-helper (LVH). The 'complexity-test' flavor is LVH's BPF-verifier test image: a BTF-enabled, bpftool-equipped rootfs bundled with the named kernel. CI boots these via the cilium/little-vm-helper action (image-repo + image + image-version). 'version' is the immutable dated tag the action consumes; 'digest' pins the same artifact for provenance/audit. Bump both together to roll the matrix forward.
